high_level_description: A porcelain teapot wearing a silver astronaut suit harvesting moonlit strawberries, a surreal cinematic photograph with a dreamlike lunar landscape and soft ambient glow.

compositional_deconstruction.background: Rolling grey lunar regolith stretching to a distant crater rim under a starless sky, a soft silver moonlight reflecting off the surface, the horizon casting long shadows, subtle blue-grey tones with a cool white glow from the moon.

elements.desc: Porcelain teapot with a glossy white glaze and delicate floral embossing, encased in a fitted silver astronaut suit with a reflective helmet visor and a small circular oxygen tank on its back, positioned slightly left of center, one hand holding a glowing red strawberry above its spout.

Three ripe red strawberries with dewy translucent skin and green leafy tops, floating mid-air in front of the teapot’s body, one caught mid-harvest with a thin silver tweezer protruding from the suit's gloved hand.

A small rectangular lunar habitat module with curved metallic panels and a rectangular solar panel array on the roof, buried into the regolith in the background, a thin vapor trail rising from its exhaust port.
